steps.title: Use the reciprocal shortcut
steps.content:
The given equation is $\frac{x}{8}=5$. Taking reciprocals switches both sides, so
$$\frac{8}{x}=\frac{1}{5}$$
This works because $x$ is not $0$; in fact, the equation implies $x=40$.

steps.title: Confirm by substitution
steps.content:
If you solve first, $x=8\cdot5=40$. Then
$$\frac{8}{x}=\frac{8}{40}=\frac{1}{5}=0.2$$
Therefore acceptable entries include 1/5 or 0.2.
